name: China Arrival Card
description: Entry card required for all foreign nationals arriving in China. Can be filled online before departure to save time at immigration.

name: China Customs Declaration
description: Required if carrying goods exceeding duty-free limits, cash exceeding USD 5,000 equivalent, or items subject to import restrictions.

name: Temporary Residence Registration
description: Within 24 hours of arrival, you must register your temporary address with the local police station. Hotels do this automatically, but private accommodation requires manual registration.
